{ "name": "spatie/laravel-signal-aware-command", "description": "Handle signals in artisan commands", "keywords": [ "spatie", "laravel", "laravel-signal-aware-command" ], "homepage": "https://github.com/spatie/laravel-signal-aware-command", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Freek Van der Herten", "email": "freek@spatie.be", "role": "Developer" } ], "require": { "php": "^8.2", "spatie/laravel-package-tools": "^1.4.3", "illuminate/contracts": "^11.0|^12.0", "symfony/console": "^7.0|^8.0" }, "require-dev": { "ext-pcntl": "*", "brianium/paratest": "^6.2|^7.0", "nunomaduro/collision": "^5.3|^6.0|^7.0|^8.0", "orchestra/testbench": "^9.0|^10.0", "pestphp/pest-plugin-laravel": "^1.3|^2.0|^3.0", "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.5|^10|^11", "spatie/laravel-ray": "^1.17" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Spatie\\SignalAwareCommand\\": "src" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Spatie\\SignalAwareCommand\\Tests\\": "tests" } }, "scripts": { "psalm": "vendor/bin/psalm", "test": "./vendor/bin/pest", "test-coverage": "vendor/bin/pest --coverage-html coverage" }, "config": { "sort-packages": true, "allow-plugins": { "pestphp/pest-plugin": true } }, "extra": { "laravel": { "providers": [ "Spatie\\SignalAwareCommand\\SignalAwareCommandServiceProvider" ], "aliases": { "Signal": "Spatie\\SignalAwareCommand\\Facades\\Signal" } } }, "minimum-stability": "dev", "prefer-stable": true }
